problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Aerogel. Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
